mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id AS conversationId, user_id AS userId, JSON_LENGTH(messages_json) AS messageCount, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM chatbot_conversation_memory WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE chatbot_conversation_memory SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
